Invalid length type - must be total, fork, standard, or carapace
\.data_type,data_type,Invalid data_type - must be individual, composite, mean, or equation
\.tissue_type,tissue_type,Invalid tissue type - must be a recognised tissue type; see data dictionary
\.sample_procedure,sample_procedure,Invalid sample procedure - must be wet or dried
\.calorimetry_method,calorimetry_method,Invalid calorimetry method - must be a recognised calorimetry method
\.sample_weight_type,sample_weight_type,Invalid sample weight type - must be wet or dry
\.lipid_percent_type,lipid_percent_type,Invalid lipid percent type - must be % sample weight or % total lipids
\.lipid_type,lipid_type,Invalid lipid type - must be fatty acids, phospholipids, sterols, or triacylglycerides
\.fatty_acid_unit,fatty_acid_unit,Invalid fatty acid unit - must be ug/mg sample weight or % total fatty acid
\.fatty_acid_type,fatty_acid_type,Invalid fatty acid type - must be a recognized fatty acid (e.g. 20:5n-3 (EPA), 22:6n-3 (DHA), ∑PUFA, etc.)
\.amino_acid_unit,amino_acid_unit,Invalid amino acid unit - must be ug/mg sample weight or % total protein
\.amino_acid_type,amino_acid_type,Invalid amino acid type - must be a recognized amino acid (e.g. Alanine, Lysine, Glycine, etc.)
\.mercury_type,mercury_type,Invalid mercury type - must be total mercury or methyl mercury
\.thiamine_type,thiamine_type,Invalid thiamine type - must be the correct Vitamer
\.energy_measurement,energy_measurement,Invalid energy measurement - must be within appropriate ranges for Joules/g wet or dry weight
\.isotope_lipid_correction,isotope_lipid_correction,Invalid isotopic lipid correction - must be either bulk or lipid free 
\.valid_common_name, common_name, Common name not found in database
\.valid_scientific_name, scientific_name, Scientific name not found in database
\.date, date, Date format does not follow the required format of yyyy-mm-dd or is an invalid date
